image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: What if I told you that time can decay?
Context visual: Half-life is the time it takes for half the nuclei in a radioactive sample to decay.
Escalation visual: Imagine a clock that counts down, but instead of seconds, it counts down atoms!
Evidence visual: For example, Carbon-14 has a half-life of about 5,730 years. After this time, half of the original amount has decayed.
Payoff visual: This decay helps scientists date ancient artifacts and understand the age of our planet.
Cta visual: Want to learn more about the mysteries of science? Hit follow for more fascinating facts!
